DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR AN ASSIGNMENT ORDER UNDER CCP 708.510(A) AND A "TURNOVER" ORDER UNDER CCP 699.040(A) ARE GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR A RESTRAINING ORDER UNDER CCP 708.520(A) IS DENIED. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION UNDER CCP 708.110(A) IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR AND SHOULD BE RESET FOR DEPARTMENT 514 PER THE PROCEDURES SET FORTH IN LOCAL RULE 8.9. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Robert Volz, Law Office of Robert Volz, 310.922.3903, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. Order signed. See order for full terms. Robert Kane, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is granted in part and denied in part. No opposition filed. Plaintiffs' motion for an assignment order under CCP 708.510(a) and a "turnover" order under CCP 699.040(a) are granted. Plaintiffs' motion for a restraining order under CCP 708.520(a) is denied. Plaintiffs' motion under CCP 708.110(a) is taken off calendar and should be reset for Department 514 per the procedures set forth in Local Rule 8.9. (Moving party to prepare order.) Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
